rationale: The T0-1 schemas faithfully transcribe PLAN.md 2.3: deck-plan enforces the contentRef pattern, transform-only-for-image bindings, rejectCount cap of 2, and releaseBlocked marker; copy-reject caps attempt at 2 with the required fields; chart-manifest makes sourceRef a claims/source-pack reference and marks sourceLabel readOnly; deck-manifest requires the three release-status fields with the export enum. All 21 named contract files exist and the four core schemas match the canonical prose. No hard-fail contradiction with the source is visible in the supplied evidence.
